title: pyrus bucharica subsp. korshinskyi
intro: Pyrus bucharica subsp. korshinskyi is a subspecies of the Pyrus bucharica, a deciduous shrub or small tree native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating cough and respiratory issues, and promoting digestive health. The herbal preparations of Pyrus bucharica subsp. korshinskyi include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine.
